characters.name: Cole Aaronson
characters.description: Cole AaronsonPortrayed byDave FrancoOccupationMedical studentAilmentMelanoma("Our Driving Issues")RelationshipDatingLucy BennettAppearancesFirst Appearance"Our First Day of School"Last Appearance"Our Thanks"  Cole Aaronsonis a surgical student atWinston University. He made his way into the program because his wealthy parents funded additions to theNew Sacred Heart Hospital. He is spoiled and has a frat-boy mentality. He rarely respects his professorsDr. CoxorTurk, but the two do scare some sense into him. He is currently in a relationship withLucy Bennettdespite his airheadedness.

characters.name: Dr. Allam
characters.description: Dr. AllamPortrayed byKymberly NewberryOccupationSurgeonAppearancesFirst Appearance"My Occurrence" Dr. Allamis a surgeon atSacred Heart Hospital. When Dr. Allam andDr. Turkare about to remove a patient's testicle due to cancer, she notices that the patient is listed as Jewish but is not circumcised. They halt the operation before any major mistakes were made.("My Occurrence")

characters.name: Allison
characters.description: AllisonPortrayed byJulie WarnerAppearancesFirst Appearance"My Tormented Mentor" AllisonisJordan Sullivan's friend. AfterBen Sullivandied, Jordan's friends Allison andMaddiecame to town for the funeral. They stuck around for several days, and their presence got on a very temprementalPerry Cox's nerves. Perry vented to J.D., who went and asked them to leave town. Dr. Cox later realized that they stayed in town to Jordan's spirits up because Perry was too busy moping in self pity.("My Tormented Mentor")

characters.name: Dr. Amato
characters.description: Dr. AmatoPortrayed byJeff AschOccupationSurgeonAppearancesFirst Appearance"My New Coat" Dr. Amatowas an attending surgeon atSacred Heart Hospital. Dr. Amato's defining characteristic is his short stature.  Being assigned to work with him was considered the surgical assignment booby prize among the surgical staff. He believed that it was possible to be a good surgeon without playing into the stereotypical boys club mentality.("My New Coat")

characters.name: Arthur
characters.description: ArthurPortrayed byTom OrmenyOccupationPeanut sellerEmployerBaseball parkAilmentTumorInjured shoulderAppearancesFirst Appearance"Our Couples" Arthurwas a patient atNew Sacred Heart Hospital. Arthur, more commonly referred to as "Art" was admitted toNew Sacred Heart Hospitalfor an injured shoulder. He knewDr. CoxandTurkfrom another stay at Sacred Heart, but had not been back since they were promoted to Chief of Medicine and Chief of Surgery. Turk and Perry enjoyed Art's company and referred to him as a legend because he had been selling peanuts at the ball park for 40 years. Art brought peanuts with him to the hospital. While discussing treatment options, the two doctors debated over physical therapy or surgery. After deciding on PT, Art's Scan revealed he had a tumor. Art told Turk that he wanted surgery, but Turk told Perry that it was too risky. Perry pulled rank and made Turk do the risky surgery. Art ended up dying in surgery.("Our Couples")

characters.name: Dr. Bailey
characters.description: Dr. BaileyPortrayed byEd Begley Jr.OccupationDoctorAilmentLegionnaires' PneumoniaAppearancesFirst Appearance"My Sacrificial Clam" Dr. Baileywas a patient atSacred Heart Hospital. Dr. Bailey and 3 other doctors,Dr. Douglas,Dr. Franklyn, andDr. Lamarwere at a conference together and all contracted Legionnaires' Pneumonia. They all shared a room atSacred Heart, andJ.D.was an intern assigned to them. They frightened him with stories of doctors who got sick from patients, and had a good laugh when J.D. left frightened. However, when J.D. admitted toElliotthat he was afraid of getting sick from a patient, he lost Dr. Bailey's respect.

Not having any money on him because he was wearing a onesie, J.D. later tellsCarlathat the bartender wanted a free physical.("My Heavy Meddle")

characters.description: Lucy BennettPortrayed byKerry BishéOccupationMedical studentRelationshipDatingCole AaronsonFamilyMaureen (Sister)AppearancesFirst Appearance"Our First Day of School"Last Appearance"Our Thanks"  Lucy Bennettis a medical student atWinston University. She had a rough time at the beginning, but under the mentorship ofJ.D.she found out that she belonged. Her current mentor isDenise Mahoney, and she is enrolled in courses being taught by the brutally honestProfessor Doctor Coxand the goofyTurk. She is datingCole Aaronsonand is friends withDrew Suffin.

characters.name: Dave Benson
characters.description: Dr. Dave BensonPortrayed byPaul CollinsOccupationFormer Chief of MedicineAilmentInfectionRelationshipMarried to a 22 year old.AppearancesFirst Appearance"My Day Off" Dr. Dave Bensonwas the Chief of Medicine atSacred Heart Hospitalfor ten years. He was later a patient there. Dr. Benson wasDr. Cox's mentor when he was an intern atSacred Heart Hospital. When Dr. Benson is admitted to Sacred Heart due to an infection, Dr. Cox wants to take care of him. He also tries to show offJ.D.to him. WhenDr. Kelsotries to discharge Dr. Benson, Cox gets upset. One hour later, Dr. Benson crashes, and Dr. Kelso drains fluid from him. He then uses Dr. Cox's words as his own - that he shouldn't leave until he wants to. Later, Dr. Cox tapes the discharge form with "Never Stop Kicking Me" to Dr. Kelso's back and Dr. Benson finds it. Benson gets upset at Kelso, but he also gets upset with Cox for not understanding how to accept things he doesn't want to.("My Day Off")

characters.name: Donna Berlutti
characters.description: Dr. Donna BerluttiPortrayed byDebra AzarOccupationOB-GYNAppearancesFirst Appearance"My Karma"Last Appearance"My Hard Labor" Dr. Donna Berluttiis an obstetrician atSacred Heart Hospital. Dr. Donna, as she prefers to be called, is Dr.Ginny Gerson's resident at Sacred Heart. Because Dr. Gerson was busy helping a woman in her 40th hour of labor, Dr. Donna had to helpJordan SullivandeliverJack Cox.Perryand Jordan were upset at how cheery she was, but the baby was successfully delivered.("My Karma")

characters.name: Ed Berman
characters.description: Dr. Ed BermanPortrayed byJeffrey HutchinsonOccupationAudiologistAppearancesFirst Appearance"My Long Goodbye" Dr. Ed BermanisSacred Heart Hospital's audiologist. WhenDr. Coxhad sentJ.D.on an errand and J.D. zoned out, he asked Dr. Berman if he could re-create the lip movements so Dr. Berman could read the lips and tell him what was said. Either J.D. or Ed messed up, because the lips were not read properly and J.D. ran the wrong errand.("My Long Goodbye")

characters.name: Fred Berry
characters.description: Fred BerryCharacterHimselfDate of birthMarch 19th, 1951IMDb profile Fred Berryplays himself onScrubs. Born in St. Louis, Missouri, Fred didn't have many roles before he was cast as Freddy "Rerun" Stubbs onWhat's Happening!!. He also reprised his role inWhat's Happening Now!. He has appeared in a handful of other films and TV shows before his death in October of 2003.

characters.name: Betty
characters.description: BettyPortrayed byEllen Albertini DowFamilyDennis(brother)AppearancesFirst Appearance"My Faith in Humanity" Bettywas a patient atSacred Heart Hospital. Betty was carried into Sacred Heart by her neighborJake. She had been at Sacred Heart nineteen times previous, withJ.D.being her assigned physician. She did not remember him, but vividly remembered the one time she met Jake. After her lungs collapsed, J.D. made the diagnosis that she would either have to live on a breathing machine or he could make her as comfortable as possible before she passed away. She wanted to talk with Jake about it, so J.D. chased him down in the parking lot and convinced him to talk to her. She decided to opt out of the breathing machine. Minutes later, Betty's brotherDennisappeared and claimed he was going to sueJakefor talking Betty into choosing death. Betty slipped into a coma so they couldn't clear her will with Dennis, so J.D. told Jake to leave without before getting caught in the legal battle. He came back and stood up to Dennis, who dropped his threat.("My Faith in Humanity")It is assumed she has passed on.

characters.name: Betty
characters.description: BettyPortrayed byEllen Albertini DowFamilyDennis(brother)AppearancesFirst Appearance"My Faith in Humanity" Bettywas a patient atSacred Heart Hospital. Betty slipped into a coma so they couldn't clear her will with Dennis, so J.D. told Jake to leave without before getting caught in the legal battle. characters.name: Betty Dombrow
characters.description: Betty DombrowPortrayed byJeanette MillerAilmentUnknownAppearancesFirst Appearance"My No Good Reason" Betty Dombrowwas a patient atSacred Heart Hospital. Betty was under the care ofElliot Reid, and had given up hope on life. When Elliot asked if there was anything she could do to make her hold on to life, Betty asked to see her dog. Elliot snuckBoomerinto the hospital with the help ofJanitor, and Betty was extremely happy.Dr. Robert Kelsofound out about the dog and suspended Elliot. Elliot argued that the dog gave Betty the will to live, but Dr. Kelso revealed that Betty had passed away hours earlier.("My No Good Reason")

characters.name: Betty Dombrow

characters.name: Jim Bianca
characters.description: Jim BiancaOccupationRadiologistRelationshipMarried Jim Biancais an albino Radiologist that works atSacred Heart Hospital. His hobbies are throwing melons at oncoming traffic and watching movies withMatthew Perry. He is shown to be a ladies' man.

characters.name: Mr. Bidwell
characters.description: Mr. BidwellPortrayed byMax KersteinAilmentUnknown, but he is a diabeticAppearancesFirst Appearance"My Best Friend's Mistake" Mr. Bidwellwas a patient atSacred Heart Hospital. Mr. Bidwell underwent surgery byDr. WenandTurk. After a successful surgery, he was transfered to the medical department.J.D.accidentally gave him insulin, twice, without knowing he was a diabetic.Nurse Robertsthought that the surgeon accidentally left something inside his body, causing his degrading condition. At the end of it all, he turned out all right.

characters.name: Mrs. Blitt
characters.description: Mrs. BlittPortrayed byMarlenaAilmentEncephalopathy and jaundiceAppearancesFirst Appearance"My Two Dads" Mrs. Blittwas a patient atSacred Heart Hospital. Mrs. Blitt is an uninsured elderly woman who couldn't pay for her T.I.P.S. procedure.Dr. Coxwanted to use Mr. Martinez's insurance, butJ.D.foolishly toldDr. Kelsothat Mr. Martinez had died. In the end, she got her procedure, but Dr. Cox was suspended. Mrs. Blitt thinks J.D. is cute.
